title: Plushie Pals CIT
description: Adorable plushie companions for your off-hand! Replaces the Totem of Undying with 11+ unique stuffed animals using CIT.
body:
# 🧸 Plushie Pals CIT

> Give your Totems of Undying a cozy makeover! Transform them into 11+ unique, adorable plushie companions that will watch your back during your Minecraft adventures.

---

## ✨ Features
*   **11+ Unique Models:** Choose from various bunnies, chicks, and even a goose!
*   **Detailed 3D Art:** High-quality models with soft, fabric-like textures.
*   **Vanilla Friendly:** Keeps the game balance while adding a huge dose of cuteness.
*   **Shoulder Placement:** Designed to look like they are sitting comfortably in your hand or on your shoulder (from 3rd person view).

---

## 🛠 How to Use
To change the appearance of your Totem, simply take it to an **Anvil** and rename it to one of the following strings (case sensitive):

### 🐰 Bunny Variants
Use these names for the rabbit models:
*   `White Bunny`
*   `Brown Bunny`
*   `Pink Bunny`
*   `Blue Bunny`
*   `Yellow Bunny`
*   `Hopz Bunny` (The cute spotted one!)
*   `Easter Bunny` (Includes a tiny basket 🧺)

### 🐥 Chick & Bird Variants
Use these names for the bird models:
*   `Yellow Chick`
*   `Pink Chick`
*   `Blue Chick`
*   `Mother Goose` (The ultimate companion! 🪿)

---

## ⚠️ Requirements
This is a **CIT (Custom Item Texture)** resource pack. It will **NOT** work without one of the following mods:

1.  **[CIT Resewn](https://modrinth.com/mod/cit-resewn)** (Recommended for Fabric/Quilt users)
2.  **[OptiFine](https://optifine.net/downloads)** (For Forge or standalone users)

*Make sure "Custom Items" are enabled in your Video Settings!*

---

## 📜 Credits
This pack is a fan-made adaptation. All original 3D models and base textures were created by the talented **Nog's Menagerie**. 
Please check out their work as well!

---

### 📷 Media
*Feel free to check the Gallery tab for more screenshots of all the plushies in action!*
